scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist && cp web/index.html dist/index.html && echo 'Development mode: Serving static files from dist/' && npx -y serve -s dist -l 3000
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && if command -v flutter > /dev/null; then flutter build web --release && cp -r build/web/* dist/; else cp web/index.html dist/index.html && echo 'Flutter build skipped or failed' > dist/build_info.txt; fi
scripts.lint: if command -v flutter > /dev/null; then flutter analyze; else echo 'Flutter SDK not found, skipping lint'; fi
